known_findings.summary: Current fixed fees are 7,500/60,000/250,000 gold at 100% success with no protection surcharge.
Strike uses 5% critical chance and +5%/+15%/+40% critical damage.
Basic Punch uses item 10281 x25 and higher-tier cumulative chains remain intact.
Vibrancy scroll IDs 51746 and 51466 are mapped and atomicity-tested.
Forgotten Knowledge Powerful families use the active 45489..45495 boss storages.
Powerful Featherweight uses 45929 and Powerful Vibrancy uses 46365, both proven completion markers.

assertions: A player without the common shrine access storage cannot open the imbuement window.
A player with the common shrine access storage can open the window.
A rejected gate does not mutate items, gold, bank balance or storages.
Every nonzero XML unlock storage is declared in the active storage registry.
Each Powerful family maps to its documented boss or quest completion path.
With filtering enabled, the family is hidden before and visible after the matching unlock.
The default-disabled filter does not mask stale storage wiring in deterministic validation.
Featherweight uses the proven Dangerous Depths completion condition.
Vibrancy uses the proven Dream Courts completion condition.
Basic entries are available under the approved account rules after common shrine access.
Intricate entries follow the approved premium-account rule.
Powerful entries require their family-specific unlock when filtering is enabled.
A hidden entry cannot be applied by sending its numeric runtime ID directly.
Displayed fee and charged fee match the current fixed-fee model.
Every valid application succeeds after resource validation.
Insufficient gold leaves all resources and slot state unchanged.
Insufficient materials leave all resources and slot state unchanged.
Successful application consumes each material and the fixed gold charge exactly once.
Each tier exposes the approved critical chance and damage values.
Equipping and unequipping adds and removes the effect exactly once.
Save and reload preserve the tier and remaining duration.
The shrine lists the approved source chain for every tier.
Successful application consumes the exact source counts.
Rejected application consumes no source items.
Each scroll resolves to the corresponding Vibrancy tier.
A valid boot receives the correct imbuement and duration.
The scroll is consumed only after successful application.
Invalid item, occupied category or unavailable slot does not consume the scroll.
An item cannot receive two imbuements from the same category.
Rejection does not consume gold, materials or scrolls.
Other eligible categories remain available in free slots.
Shrine clearing removes only the selected slot and charges exactly 15000 gold.
Insufficient gold leaves the imbuement and resources unchanged.
Etcher clears all active slots and is consumed only on success.
Etcher used on an item without active imbuements is not consumed.
Aggressive imbuements decay while equipped, in combat and outside protection zones.
They do not decay out of combat, in a protection zone or inside a backpack.
Crossing a decay boundary cannot remove stats more than once.
Non-aggressive imbuements decay while their item is directly equipped.
They do not decay while their item is stored in a container.
The optional non-aggressive-fight-only setting changes behavior exactly as documented.
Imbuement IDs, slots and remaining duration survive save, logout and login.
An expired effect is absent after reload and its modifiers are not applied.
Repeated equip or login paths do not duplicate modifiers.
Only item-declared categories and tiers appear in the shrine.
Items with no imbuement slots are rejected.
Native conflicting bonuses are not offered under the approved rules.
Leg items are not imbuable under the current referenced rules.
The complete active item set is compared with the current reference in a separate deterministic audit.
